DISCOVERY, 610, PLAINTIFF L.A. COMMERCIAL GROUP, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $300, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. NOT REPORTED.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2011 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-09-2010 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-01-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice And Motion To Compelling Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set No. One And For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-05-2010 Advanced From May-05-10 To May-05-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF L.A. COMMERCIAL GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $300, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported. (610/EAH)

Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Demand For Production Of Documents And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF L.A. COMMERCIAL GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Compel Responses To Demand For Production Of Documents, And For Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The motion was filed April 9, 2010. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported. (610/EAH)
